description: Intent-only request: classify support triage as hybrid classify-then-route rather than a full agent.

text: When a new Zendesk ticket arrives, read the message, classify it as billing, bug, account access, or product question, set priority as low/normal/high, and route it to the matching team in Slack.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the Zendesk triage request as a hybrid classify-then-route workflow.
The agent explains that AI is useful for the bounded ticket classification and priority judgment.
The agent explains that deterministic routing should handle the fixed downstream Slack team assignment.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because there is no open-ended tool-use loop.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as hybrid classify-then-route and rejects full-agent handling.
